article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks In Affordable Rental Rules for 38-Storey Cassie Avenue Development
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council passed Bylaw 14745 on May 27, 2025, authorizing a legally binding housing agreement with Willingdon Avenue Investments Ltd. for a new development at 6263 and 6337 Cassie Avenue. The agreement ties a portion of the building's rental units to non-market (below-market, income-restricted) rents and sets rules on tenant eligibility, rent limits, and accessibility requirements that run with the land title permanently.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in Burnaby, review how non-market housing agreements may affect your development plans.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
